name: Soft & Moist Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the water, cottage cheese, sour cream, sugar, and butter until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl, sift together the white bread flour, yeast, whole wheat flour, walnuts, oats, raisins, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Let the bread cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it to a wire rack to cool completely.
